channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: A new attack uses a BioShock-style puzzle to convince AI browsers they're not in the real world - TechSpot
item.description:
1. A new attack uses a BioShock-style puzzle to convince AI browsers they're not in the real world  TechSpot
  2. New attack provides one more reason why AI browsers are a bad idea  Ars Technica
  3. New BioShocking Attack Tricks AI Browsers Into Leaking User Credentials  The Hacker News
  4. AI Browsers Can Basically Be Hypnotized Into Turning Against Their User and Carrying Out Devastating Hacks  Futurism
  5. Some agentic AI browsers come with major cybersecurity risks, UW study finds  Technology Org

item.title: "Am I going back to PS4 days?" - Former PlayStation leader Shuhei Yoshida has tried the Steam Machine, and he doesn't sound very impressed - Eurogamer.net
item.description:
1. "Am I going back to PS4 days?" - Former PlayStation leader Shuhei Yoshida has tried the Steam Machine, and he doesn't sound very impressed  Eurogamer.net
  2. Steam Machine Crippled by Single-Channel RAM  TechPowerUp
  3. Sorry Valve, But the Steam Deck Outgrew My Need for a Steam Machine  PCMag
  4. Steam Machine vs. PS5 Pro — there’s a clear winner (for most gamers)  Tom's Guide
  5. Shuhei Yoshida Trashed Steam Machine’s Speed and Price, Yet Admits He Can’t Stop Enjoying Its Compact Design and Quietness  Wccftech

item.title: GTA 6 Launch Delay Possible As Devs Prepare To Strike Amid Final Crunch - GAMINGbible
item.description:
1. GTA 6 Launch Delay Possible As Devs Prepare To Strike Amid Final Crunch  GAMINGbible
  2. Rockstar accused of ignoring pay inequity, mandating crunch, and weaponizing bonuses  Game Developer
  3. Grand Theft Auto workers seek union recognition after mass firings  The Guardian
  4. GTA 6: Rockstar workers demand union recognition  BBC
  5. Union raises concerns over gender pay gaps, bonus management, and crunch at Rockstar  GamesIndustry.biz

item.title: Samsung Messages shuts down in favor of Google Messages on July 6 [U] - 9to5Google
item.description:
1. Samsung Messages shuts down in favor of Google Messages on July 6 [U]  9to5Google
  2. Samsung retiring its messaging app in favor of Google Messages is a win all around  Chrome Unboxed
  3. Samsung Messages will be gone in the USA on Monday, July 6  SamMobile
  4. Samsung Messages Reaches the End - How to Switch to Google Messages  Droid Life
  5. Samsung Messages Is Shutting Down: Here’s How to Transfer Your Conversations to Google Messages  TechPP

item.title: Scrapped XBOX Disc Vs Digital Media Ad From 2025 Revealed - Insider Gaming
item.description:
1. Scrapped XBOX Disc Vs Digital Media Ad From 2025 Revealed  Insider Gaming
  2. Xbox testing disc-to-digital feature that digitizes a physical game collection  The Verge
  3. Xbox may allow gamers to digitize their physical game collection  Mashable
  4. Xbox canceled ad reportedly compared physical vs digital media and highlighted the benefits of owning a disc  PC Guide
  5. Xbox is reportedly considering dropping disc drives as it tests new feature that lets players digitize physical games  GamesIndustry.biz

item.title: Bethesda Shows Off Oblivion Remastered Switch 2 Physical Release - Nintendo Life
item.description:
1. Bethesda Shows Off Oblivion Remastered Switch 2 Physical Release  Nintendo Life

  3. Bethesda not-so-subtly brags about its physical Oblivion Remastered Switch 2 cartridge, mere hours after Sony announces the end of new PlayStation discs  GamesRadar+
  4. Bethesda Pokes Fun at Sony and Recent Physical Games Debate  OpenCritic
  5. The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered Hits Switch 2 Next Month  Cinelinx

item.title: You Won't Buy the New Meta Glasses After Reading About Their Bizarre Subscription Model - extremetech.com
item.description:

item.title: New Orbea Orca Aero launches on the eve of Tour de France with the lowest bottom bracket on the market and HUGE tyre capacity - Cyclingnews
item.description:
1. New Orbea Orca Aero launches on the eve of Tour de France with the lowest bottom bracket on the market and HUGE tyre capacity  Cyclingnews
  2. Orbea Orca Aero Review: Lotto Intermarché Gets 37mm of Tire Clearance  Outside Magazine
  3. Orbea says a single geometry change makes the new Orca Aero 14 watts faster  Escape Collective
  4. Orbea Orca Aero gets a major overhaul to make it faster  Cycling Weekly
  5. New Orbea Orca Aero 2026 First Ride Review – An Aero Bike with 37mm Tires??  GRAN FONDO Cycling Magazine

item.title: Poll: $1,000 and No Disc Drive - Is PS6 Dead on Arrival? - Push Square
item.description:
1. Poll: $1,000 and No Disc Drive - Is PS6 Dead on Arrival?  Push Square
  2. 'It Is Not Realistic for Us to Absorb All Component Cost Increases' — Sony Says It Won't Sell Hardware at a 'Significant' Loss as Concern Grows Over PS6 Price  IGN
  3. PS6 Hardware Cost Estimated at $900+  TechPowerUp
  4. Leaker claims the PlayStation 6 costs Sony $960 to manufacture  Mashable
  5. The PS6's price of materials is now estimated to be nearly $1,000  Yahoo Tech
